   • Total estimated flight cost: €250.

2. Accommodation:

3. Meal/Restaurant Options (Vegan, Organic, Plant-Based):
   • Breakfast: Consider local organic cafés or a light breakfast at your hostel. Estimated at about €10 per day.

       - Vegan Bistro: Estimated meal cost €25 per meal.
       - Italian Trattoria (with vegan selections): Approximately €30 per meal.
     To keep within budget, you might plan for an average of €20 per meal over three meals a day (allowing for a combination of light and hearty options). 
     • Estimated total meal cost for 5 days (3 meals/day): 5 days x 3 meals x €20 = €300. 
       (Note: You can adjust by choosing some lighter options or cooking in the hostel kitchen to reduce costs.)

   • Adventure Element: A city bike rental with a self-guided urban adventure route – approximately €15.
   • Total for these activities: €20 + €15 + €25 + €15 = €75.
   • (You can opt for additional local activities; however, to remain under budget, these should suffice.)

5. Complete Cost Breakdown:

   • Accommodation: €325
   • Meals: €300
   • Activities: €75
